title: tockPurchasedExperience
description: tockPurchasedExperience schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier for the experience. Used internally by Tock.

name.description: The name given to the experience which is displayed prominently when booking or within the Tock Dashboard.

amountCents.description: The amount added to the total price for the experience and does not contain any values associated with add-on(s) or menu item(s).

posSku.description: If assigned by the business from the Tock Dashboard, this field will be the SKU denoting the experience.

variety.description: The type of experience being offered by the business.
